title: Villager Pets
description: A datapack that adds pets to villages, featuring cats and dogs!
body:
This is a simple, lightweight datapack that simply gives each adult villager a chance to have a pet dog or cat. 

The datapack is set up in a way that baby villagers who have been loaded near the player will not have pets after growing up, allowing you to afk near villager breeders without problem.

Villager wolves will have a variant based on the biome, while cats are random. The wolves will protect their owner just like a player.

Villager pets cannot be tamed by players even after the villager dies.


<details>
<summary>Uninstallation</summary>

To uninstall the pack, type /function igvp:uninstall
Then, remove the datapack from the world in the world folder

</details>
